description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a broad, dark gable roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a reddish-brown paved base. The roof extends over a covered porch at the front, supported by thick columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray tone, and the house features a series of small, horizontally-aligned windows along the sides. The rear of the house includes a partially enclosed area, possibly a patio or service space, with some fencing visible. The overall design is low and wide, typical of suburban or ranch-style homes, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functional, clean lines. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from masonry or concrete, with a shingled roof and glass windows.
description: A single-story, gray house with a wide, dark gable roof, covered front porch, and small horizontal windows, set on a paved base. The design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide gable roof, covered porch, and main entryway with supporting columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, low profile, series of small windows, and the paved base extending around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a partially enclosed area, some fencing, and the back slope of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more small windows and the continuation of the paved base.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement, small horizontal windows in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with thick columns, steps leading to a single main door, and a prominent roof overhang
